{{Quote|Why us, Brazzo? What have we done?|Selle|<ref name="Vader's Quest 1">[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Selle''' was a Human female bounty hunter on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] who learned the identity of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. She and her brother [[Brazzo]] fled from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who eventually caught them. She was killed by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt deflected by Vader's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
[[File:SelleDeath.jpg|thumb|left|The death of Selle.]]
